title: operator SUBSCRIPTION_DAYS not validated against CHRONO_MAX_DAYS for fallback path
description: In activate_subscription (payment_watcher.rs), fallback_days comes from invoice.subscription_days.unwrap_or(state.inner.subscription_days). The per-request duration_days IS capped against CHRONO_MAX_DAYS in SUBSCRIBE_REQUEST, but state.inner.subscription_days (from the SUBSCRIPTION_DAYS env var) is not. If an operator sets SUBSCRIPTION_DAYS > 106_751_991, fallback_days as i64 can overflow or cause chrono::Duration::days() to panic in the payment watcher path for pre-migration invoices that have no subscription_days stored. Fix: validate SUBSCRIPTION_DAYS against CHRONO_MAX_DAYS at startup.
